overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk through a futuristic Japanese-inspired urban district. The player character descends from an upper plaza through neon-lit alleys and covered market passages, transitioning from bright sunlight to shadowy underpasses before emerging into a dusty industrial area. The environment features a dense mix of traditional architectural elements and cyberpunk neon signage.

events.description: begins descending from open upper plaza into lower alley level via concrete ramp
continues descent down concrete stairs into the lower district

agents.ego_description: walking down a concrete ramp and stairs from an elevated plaza into a lower urban district

wide concrete ramp leading down to lower level with beige walls
tall pink and grey vending machine with glowing elements
elevated walkway connecting buildings across the plaza

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit upper plaza with traditional Japanese architecture. The player descends a wide concrete ramp into a lower urban level, passing a pink vending machine while an overhead pedestrian bridge spans the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow neon-lit alley with hotel and entertainment signs

events.description: moving from bright sunlight into shadowy area illuminated by neon signs
navigating around a pedestrian standing in the alley path

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow alleyway lined with glowing neon signs and steam vents

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing yellow hard hat standing in the middle of the path

entered.detail: large blue neon sign with Japanese text 'ホテル' and bed icon
purple neon sign with triple X symbols indicating adult entertainment
ground-level steam rising from vents in the alley floor
external air conditioning units mounted on building walls

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow alleyway dense with cyberpunk neon signage including a prominent hotel sign and adult entertainment markers. Steam rises from floor vents as the player navigates around a stationary pedestrian, with the environment shifting from natural to mixed neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cafe plaza with outdoor seating and food vendors

events.description: exiting narrow alley into more open plaza area with outdoor cafe seating
passing through area with palm trees and colorful food carts

agents.ego_description: navigating through the district past outdoor cafe seating and food vendors

notable_agents.action: child in bright pink shirt standing near cafe tables

green and red large patio umbrellas over plastic chairs and tables
tall palm tree in a concrete planter

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a sunlit plaza featuring the 'Snapped Synapse Roasters' cafe with striped awnings and outdoor seating. The player passes palm trees and a blue food cart while navigating around pedestrians, transitioning from the enclosed alley to a more open commercial area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway and underpass with utility structures

events.description: entering covered underpass area with reduced natural light
moving into darker shaded area beneath concrete overpass

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered walkway beneath concrete structures, passing utility boxes and debris

entered.detail: massive concrete beams and ceiling of the pedestrian underpass
horizontal green neon tubes mounted on the tunnel walls
old mattress propped up on a rolling cart against the wall

segments.scene_description: The player enters a semi-covered underpass characterized by massive concrete structural beams and green neon strip lighting. The environment shows signs of urban decay with a discarded mattress on a cart and scattered debris, while the blue food cart recedes into the distance behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark pedestrian tunnel with artificial neon lighting

events.description: entering artificially lit tunnel with prominent green neon signage
approaching bright tunnel exit with increasing natural light

agents.ego_description: walking through a dark concrete tunnel toward a brightly lit exit

entered.detail: low concrete ceiling with exposed pipes and cables
large cyan neon arrows pointing forward suspended from ceiling
bright daylight visible at the end of the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The player traverses a dark enclosed tunnel illuminated by green neon arrow signs and strip lights. The environment is devoid of pedestrians and features a low concrete ceiling with exposed utilities, while bright daylight becomes increasingly visible at the tunnel's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial loading area with construction debris

events.description: exiting tunnel into open industrial area with bright sunlight
approaching large stationary industrial truck in the open area

agents.ego_description: emerging from the dark tunnel into a dusty industrial area with a large parked truck

notable_agents.action: large industrial truck parked in the center of the open area

entered.detail: large grey industrial transport truck with boxy cab and covered bed
scattered trash and construction materials on the gravel ground
tall futuristic skyscrapers visible in the distance against blue sky

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the tunnel into a bright, dusty industrial loading area. A large industrial truck dominates the center of the space, surrounded by construction debris and gravel, with futuristic high-rise towers visible in the background under clear blue skies.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, traditional upper plaza down into a neon-lit urban corridor before emerging into a sunlit commercial square. It begins by descending a wide concrete ramp past a pink vending machine and beneath an overhead pedestrian bridge, moving from the open sunlight of the upper level toward a denser urban environment. As the camera enters a narrow alleyway, the natural light fades and is replaced by the glow of cyberpunk neon signage and steam rising from floor vents. The scene then opens up as the player exits the enclosed alley, transitioning back into a bright plaza featuring palm trees, a blue food cart, and the striped awnings of the Snapped Synapse Roasters cafe.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a decaying, neon-lit underpass into a bright, open industrial loading zone. It begins by entering a semi-covered passage defined by massive concrete beams and green neon strips, moving past a discarded mattress and scattered debris as a blue food cart recedes into the distance. The camera then pushes deeper into a dark, enclosed tunnel where green neon arrows and exposed utilities line a low ceiling, while a pinpoint of bright daylight grows larger at the far end. As the player exits the tunnel, the oppressive shadows give way to a dusty industrial area dominated by a large truck and gravel-strewn ground. The scene finally opens up to reveal futuristic high-rise towers standing against a clear blue sky.
